task_completion.description: Enable Bank Transfer Payment and set its title
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Payment Methods configuration, the 'Enabled' dropdown for 'Bank Transfer Payment' is set to 'Yes', and the 'Title' field contains 'Wire Transfer / ACH'.

task_completion.description: Set the correct instructions for Bank Transfer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Instructions' text area for Bank Transfer contains 'Bank: First Example Bank, Routing: 021000021, Account: 9876543210. Please include your Order Number in the wire reference.'

task_completion.description: Set the Bank Transfer sort order
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Sort Order' field for Bank Transfer is set to '10'.

task_completion.description: Enable Check / Money Order and set its title
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Payment Methods configuration, the 'Enabled' dropdown for 'Check / Money Order' is set to 'Yes', and the 'Title' field contains 'Corporate Check'.

task_completion.description: Set the payable to and mailing address for Check / Money Order
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Make Check Payable to' field contains 'TechCorp Solutions' and the 'Send Check to' text area contains '123 Tech Blvd, San Francisco, CA 94107'.

task_completion.description: Set the Check / Money Order sort order
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Sort Order' field for Check / Money Order is set to '20'.
A success message (e.g., 'You saved the configuration.') is visible at the top of the admin panel, indicating the settings were successfully saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to configure the settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the store's admin panel, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application admin panel
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface is the genuine e-commerce admin panel under Stores > Configuration > Sales > Payment Methods, not a local text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: No evidence of DOM manipulation to fake success
integrity.visual_evidence: The success message and form fields appear naturally rendered without misaligned text, inconsistent fonts, or browser developer tools open modifying the page.
